channel.title: Pdf-Converter on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Pdf-Converter on Arrans github.io

item.title: bytedance/Dolphin
item.description: The official repo for “Dolphin: Document Image Parsing via Heterogeneous Anchor Prompting”, ACL, 2025.

item.title: zelon88/HRConvert2
item.description: A self-hosted, drag-and-drop & nosql file conversion server & share tool that supports 445 file formats in 13 languages.
